name: lencamo-skill
description: Personal skill collection for Codex: doc-feat-desc, git-smart-commit.

plugins.name: doc-feat-desc
plugins.description: Generate a three-file user documentation bundle from real implementation, including help-center copy, site copy, and in-product guidance.

plugins.name: git-smart-commit
plugins.description: Detect the current project's commit convention and generate a short commit header that matches the repository style.
